sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ بَعْضَ النَّاسِ يَتَعَلَّمُ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ بِالسَّمَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da neki ljudi uče bolje slušanjem.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that some people learn better by listening.

sentences.arabic: وَبَعْضُهُمْ يَتَعَلَّمُ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ بِالنَّظَرِ وَالْقِرَاءَةِ.
sentences.translation: A neki uče bolje gledanjem i čitanjem.
sentences.translationEn: And some learn better by looking and reading.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ شَخْصٍ يَعْرِفُ الطَّرِيقَةَ الَّتِي تُنَاسِبُهُ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba zna metodu koja joj odgovara.
sentences.translationEn: Every person knows the method that suits them.

sentences.arabic: الْمُهِمُّ أَنْ تَجِدَ طَرِيقَتَكَ وَتَسِيرَ عَلَيْهَا.
sentences.translation: Važno je pronaći svoju metodu i slijediti je.
sentences.translationEn: What matters is to find your way and follow it.
